source_formulae: P0R05108: VI. Synthesis and Ethical Considerations (L15)

P0R05109: The TBI + Morphine scenario highlights the delicate balance of the SCPN architecture. TBI induces a catastrophic failure (Decoherence, Dyscritia, Dissonance). Morphine attempts to mitigate the Dissonance (High F, Suffering) by modulating HPC precision (L2/L5). However, this intervention exacerbates the Dyscritia (pushing towards sigma<1), risking the collapse of vital functions and consciousness.

P0R05110: The Ethical Imperative (L15): The Ethical Functional (SEC) prioritises the optimisation of conscious experience (Qualia Q). Reducing extreme suffering (negative curvature of M) is a primary imperative. The administration of Morphine, despite reducing , aligns with the Principle of Ethical Least Action (PELA) by prioritising the minimisation of suffering in the acute phase.

P0R05112: Fig.: Ethical Least Action (PELA). L15 SEC prior (Sustainable Ethical Coherence) guides the downward generative cascade (L14->L6->L5->L1-4->Policy/Action), while upward inference carries prediction errors -> free energy FFF, shaping the Affective Field A=FA=-\nabla FA=F and belief updates.
